purpose: Define the closeout-admission evidence contract that later completion-audit beads can implement without relying on planning-context memory.

summary.problem: Pi Rust has a completion-audit builder that can compare objective requirements to direct evidence, but closeout admission is not yet documented as a first-class machine-readable contract.
summary.recommended_track: Keep the audit advisory at first, then add direct Beads/git evidence adapters, no-mock integration coverage, runpack and handoff projections, and a lightweight closeout gate.
non_goals: Do not mutate live Agent Mail state from the audit adapter.
Do not mutate RCH state or require heavyweight cargo validation for docs-only inventory work.
Do not delete files or directories.
Do not make release, capacity, performance, or strict drop-in replacement claims.

phase_1_grounding.overlap_result: A closeout-freshness idea overlapped existing closed or deferred work, so this track was scoped to completion-audit closeout admission instead.

selected_top_idea.title: Completion-audit closeout enforcement
selected_top_idea.reason: It turns an existing prompt-to-evidence evaluator into a reusable closeout admission surface for multi-agent work.

objective_markdown.source: operator prompt, Beads issue descriptions, or closeout runpack objectives
objective_markdown.notes: The current builder extracts requirement-like bullets and command/file/artifact claims from markdown objective text.

evidence_json.source: closeout evidence bundle assembled by later adapter work
evidence_json.notes: Evidence must include command results, artifact paths, git state, pushed-ref state, unresolved gaps, and optional human-readable summaries.

git_state.source: direct git commands from the workspace
blockers: missing commit evidence for code or evidence changes
dirty files that are part of the claimed work

beads_state.source: br show, br ready, and br sync evidence
blockers: source bead is not closed for a final closeout audit
closed bead lacks a close reason tied to direct evidence
required dependent follow-up is neither complete nor tracked

agent_mail_coordination.source: Agent Mail tool outputs when available
blockers: claimed exclusive edit surface conflicts with another active reservation
completion claims cite coordination that is absent from the evidence bundle
agent_mail_coordination.mutation_policy: The audit reads supplied evidence only; it must not acquire or release reservations by itself.

rch_validation_posture.required: when cargo or heavyweight validation is part of the objective
blockers: heavy cargo command was required but no rch or equivalent proof was supplied
command failed and no follow-up bead or blocker was recorded
staged Rust files were changed without a staged UBS proof
orphan critical or high drop-in gap
stale active bead references a non-active critical or high gap

closeout_gates.notes: Completion audit should be able to cite existing closeout gates as artifacts, but those gates cannot replace command, git, Beads, and pushed-ref evidence.

runpack_operator_handoff.notes: Later projection work should surface completion-audit status in runpacks and handoff summaries without changing the source audit decision.

current_completion_audit_surface.completion_allowed_rule: Completion is allowed only when no evaluated requirement is failed, missing, contradiction-bearing, proxy-only, or uncertain in a way that blocks the objective.
existing_direct_evidence: command outputs supplied in evidence JSON
artifact paths supplied in evidence JSON
latest commit and pushed status captured from git
unresolved gaps supplied in evidence JSON
current_gaps: No standard adapter assembles Beads issue state into completion-audit evidence.
No standard adapter records branch push state, dirty file state, and close reason in the same evidence object.
No no-mock integration test proves the closeout path against a temporary git and Beads workspace.
Runpack and handoff scripts do not yet project completion-audit status.
CI and runbook guidance do not yet include a lightweight advisory completion-audit gate.

direct_evidence_requirements: source bead state and close reason
git commit evidence for touched files
pushed-ref evidence when the workflow requires a push
validation command transcript with exit codes
artifact existence and JSON parse evidence for claimed JSON artifacts
UBS staged or changed-line proof for staged Rust changes
explicit blocker or follow-up bead for unfinished required work
proxy_only_blockers: Natural-language summary without command, git, or artifact evidence.
Agent Mail note that claims completion but lacks workspace evidence.
RCH or cargo claim without command transcript and exit code.
Artifact path listed without existence or parse proof.
Close reason that does not reference direct evidence.

negative_controls: stale or absent Beads close reason remains blocked

requirements: Use a temporary real git repository instead of mocks for commit and push-state evidence.
Use real Beads command output or fixture files generated from real Beads JSON shape.
Exercise pass, missing artifact, failed command, unpushed commit, and proxy-only evidence scenarios.
Keep golden updates explicit and reviewable.
Project audit status, decision, blocked requirement count, and next actions into runpacks.
Project the same status into operator handoff summaries without changing the canonical audit decision.
Preserve redaction boundaries and safe-next-action structure.
Wire an advisory lightweight gate only after CA-2 through CA-4 are implemented.
Document how operators interpret closeout-admitted, closeout-blocked, and advisory-only decisions.
Keep claims bounded to closeout evidence quality, not product completeness.
Publish a closeout evidence bundle for the completion-audit enforcement track.
Prove all child beads are closed or intentionally tracked.
Prove final audit state and Beads graph state with direct command evidence.
Leave the parent epic closed only after the advisory gate has current evidence.

negative_controls.name: proxy_only_evidence
negative_controls.reason: Closeout cannot be admitted from narrative summary alone.

negative_controls.name: missing_pushed_ref
negative_controls.reason: The session workflow requires pushed commits before work is complete.

negative_controls.name: failed_command
negative_controls.reason: A required validation command with nonzero exit cannot be treated as passing.

negative_controls.name: missing_artifact
negative_controls.reason: Claimed JSON evidence must exist and parse.

negative_controls.name: unresolved_followup
negative_controls.reason: Required unfinished work must have an owner bead or explicit blocker.

negative_controls.name: stale_beads_status
negative_controls.reason: Closeout must reflect current Beads state, not stale planning text.

negative_controls.name: forbidden_claims
negative_controls.reason: Deletion, release, capacity, performance, and strict drop-in claims are outside this bead.

follow_on_beads.role: Project audit status into runpacks and handoff summaries
Wire lightweight advisory gate into CI and runbooks
Close out completion-audit enforcement with advisory evidence gate
